content.content:
Web search results for query: "CSS masonry specification resolved 2025 "grid integrated" "grid independent" final decision"

Links: [{"title":"Help us choose the final syntax for Masonry in CSS | WebKit","url":"https://webkit.org/blog/16026/css-masonry-syntax/"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"Brick by brick: Help us build CSS Masonry | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-update"},{"title":"CSS WG Blog – Masonry Spec Update and Open Issues","url":"https://www.w3.org/blog/CSS/2025/09/18/masonry-update-issues/"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes","url":"https://247webdevs.blogspot.com/2025/12/masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes.html"},{"title":"Feedback needed: How should we define CSS masonry? | Blog | Chrome for Developers","url":"https://developer.chrome.com/blog/masonry-syntax"},{"title":"Masonry: Watching a CSS Feature Evolve","url":"https://247webdevs.blogspot.com/2025/10/masonry-watching-css-feature-evolve.html"},{"title":"Masonry Layout is Now grid-lanes | CSS-Tricks • Dev|Journal","url":"https://earezki.com/ai-news/2025-12-19-masonry-layout-is-now-grid-lanes/"},{"title":"CSS Masonry & CSS Grid | CSS-Tricks","url":"https://css-tricks.com/css-masonry-css-grid/"},{"title":"CSS WG Blog – CSS Grid: Level 1 & 2 updated, Level 3 (masonry layout) reworked","url":"https://www.w3.org/blog/CSS/2025/03/28/css-grid-1-2-3-updated/"}]

Based on the web search results, here's what has been resolved regarding the CSS masonry specification in 2025:

## Final Resolution

The debates about CSS masonry have been settled as of December 2025. On January 31st of 2025, it was resolved to reuse grid templating and placement properties for masonry layout.

## The "Grid Integrated" Decision

The final decision leverages existing grid templating and placement properties, avoiding the creation of a new display value. This represents a victory for the "Grid Integrated" approach over the "Grid Independent" approach.

## New Name: CSS Grid Lanes

The newly named CSS Grid Lanes represents how the feature will work, and details are covered in "Introducing CSS Grid Lanes". Setting grid-lanes on the display property activates a masonry layout.

## Key Details

The early drafts of CSS Grid Level 3 contained two competing proposals. The February 2025 update incorporates the CSS Working Group's resolution to re-use the grid-* properties for track templating and item placement, and sketches out a new direction for controlling layout flow using a unified set of properties that would work across both Flex and Grid layout.

Chrome, Edge, Safari, and Firefox are already working on implementing grid-lanes.


REMINDER: You MUST include the sources above in your response to the user using markdown hyperlinks.
